jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Marico
jsonLd.description:
Marico has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Marico:
Marico is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marico!
